<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer v1.2.12 -->

# src/ai

AIService orchestrator and backend registry for spawning AI CLI subprocesses with exponential backoff retry, timeout enforcement, rate limit detection, and per-run telemetry logging.

## Contents

**[index.ts](./index.ts)** — Barrel export enforcing isolation boundary: exports `AIProvider`, `AIBackend`, `AIResponse`, `AICallOptions`, `SubprocessResult`, `RetryOptions`, `TelemetryEntry`, `RunLog`, `FileRead` from `types.js`; `AIServiceOptions` from `service.js`; `SubprocessProviderOptions` from `providers/subprocess.js`; `AIServiceError`, `AIService`, `BackendRegistry`, `createBackendRegistry`, `resolveBackend`, `detectBackend`, `detectAvailableBackends`, `getInstallInstructions`, `withRetry`, `DEFAULT_RETRY_OPTIONS`, `runSubprocess`, `SubprocessProvider`, `isCommandOnPath`. Prohibits direct imports from `backends/` or `telemetry/`.

**[registry.ts](./registry.ts)** — `BackendRegistry` stores AIBackends in insertion order via `Map<string, AIBackend>`; `register(backend)` adds backends, `get(name)` retrieves by name, `getAll()` returns all in priority order. `createBackendRegistry()` pre-populates with ClaudeBackend, CodexBackend, GeminiBackend, OpenCodeBackend in detection priority. `detectBackend(registry)` iterates `backend.isAvailable()`, returns first found or null. `detectAvailableBackends(registry)` checks all backends for availability, returns array of available ones in registration order. `resolveBackend(registry, requested)` auto-detects when `requested === 'auto'`, validates explicit names, throws `AIServiceError('CLI_NOT_FOUND')` with aggregated `getInstallInstructions()` when unavailable. `getInstallInstructions(registry)` aggregates `backend.getInstallInstructions()` calls into newline-separated string for error messages.

**[retry.ts](./retry.ts)** — `withRetry<T>(fn, options)` executes async function with exponential backoff (`min(baseDelayMs * multiplier^attempt, maxDelayMs) + jitter[0-500ms]`), retries if `options.isRetryable(error)` returns true, throws immediately if false, throws last error after `maxRetries` exhausted. `DEFAULT_RETRY_OPTIONS` sets `maxRetries: 3`, `baseDelayMs: 1000`, `maxDelayMs: 8000`, `multiplier: 2`, omits `isRetryable` and `onRetry` for caller-specific predicates.

**[service.ts](./service.ts)** — `AIService` wraps `AIProvider` or `AIBackend` (auto-wrapped in `SubprocessProvider` via `isAIBackend` type guard checking `buildArgs`, `parseResponse`, `cliCommand` fields), orchestrates `call()` with retry logic (retries `RATE_LIMIT` only, never `TIMEOUT`), emits `{type:'retry', attempt, taskLabel, errorCode}` trace events, records `TelemetryEntry` per call with `timestamp`, `prompt`, `systemPrompt`, `response`, token counts, `latencyMs`, `exitCode`, `retryCount`, `thinking: 'not supported'`, `filesRead: []`, instantiates `TelemetryLogger` with `new Date().toISOString()`, backend name (or `'custom'`), model, command, `finalize()` writes `RunLog` via `writeRunLog` to `.agents-reverse-engineer/logs/run-{command}-{backend}-{model}-{timestamp}.json` and prunes old logs via `cleanupOldLogs` keeping `telemetry.keepRuns` most recent logs sorted by ISO timestamp filename, exposes `setTracer(ITraceWriter)` forwarding to `SubprocessProvider` if applicable, `setDebug(boolean)` enabling verbose subprocess logging to stderr, `setSubprocessLogDir(string)` enabling per-subprocess `.log` files with metadata/stdout/stderr via serialized `logWriteQueue`, `setSubprocessCwd(string)` overriding CWD to prevent discovery of project context files (CLAUDE.md, package.json) that waste cache tokens, `addFilesReadToLastEntry(FileRead[])` attaching file-read metadata to most recent entry, `getSummary()` returning current run statistics without finalizing.

**[subprocess.ts](./subprocess.ts)** — `runSubprocess(command, args, options)` spawns CLI subprocess with `execFile`, enforces `timeoutMs` with SIGTERM→SIGKILL escalation after `SIGKILL_GRACE_MS` (5000ms), pipes `options.input` to stdin then closes stream via `child.stdin.end()` to prevent child blocking on EOF (critical for Claude CLI), tracks active processes in `activeSubprocesses: Map<number, {command, spawnedAt}>`, attempts process group kill `process.kill(-child.pid, 'SIGKILL')` before falling back to single process, fires `options.onSpawn(pid)` callback synchronously at spawn time for trace events, distinguishes timeout (`error.killed && code !== 'ERR_CHILD_PROCESS_STDIO_MAXBUFFER'`) from maxBuffer overflow, extracts exit code via hierarchy (`error.code` if number, else `child.exitCode`, else 1 for unknown failures, 0 for success), never rejects (captures all errors in `SubprocessResult` fields `exitCode`, `timedOut`, `stderr`). Exports `getActiveSubprocessCount()` and `getActiveSubprocesses()` returning snapshot with `pid`, `command`, `spawnedAt`, `runningMs` for observability.

**[types.ts](./types.ts)** — Defines `SubprocessResult` (stdout, stderr, exitCode, signal, durationMs, timedOut, childPid), `AICallOptions` (prompt, systemPrompt, model, timeoutMs, maxTurns, taskLabel, allowedTools comma-separated enabling agentic mode, cwd working directory override taking precedence over service-level CWD), `AIResponse` (text, model, inputTokens, outputTokens, cacheReadTokens, cacheCreationTokens, durationMs, exitCode, raw), `AIProvider` (call method), `AIBackend` (name, cliCommand, isAvailable, buildArgs, parseResponse, getInstallInstructions, optional composeStdinInput for backends folding system prompts into stdin, optional ensureProjectConfig for provisioning backend resources like OpenCode's `.opencode/agents/` config), `RetryOptions` (maxRetries, baseDelayMs, maxDelayMs, multiplier, isRetryable, onRetry), `FileRead` (path relative to project root, sizeBytes), `TelemetryEntry` (timestamp ISO 8601, prompt, systemPrompt, response, model, token counts, latencyMs, exitCode, error, retryCount, thinking "not supported" when unavailable, filesRead), `RunLog` (runId ISO timestamp-based, startTime, endTime, backend, model, command e.g. "generate"/"update", entries TelemetryEntry[], summary with totalCalls, totalInputTokens, totalOutputTokens, totalDurationMs, errorCount, totalCacheReadTokens, totalCacheCreationTokens, totalFilesRead, uniqueFilesRead), `AIServiceErrorCode` (`CLI_NOT_FOUND`, `TIMEOUT`, `PARSE_ERROR`, `SUBPROCESS_ERROR`, `RATE_LIMIT`), `AIServiceError` (code, message).

## Subdirectories

**[backends/](./backends/)** — Backend adapters for Claude, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode implementing `AIBackend` interface: CLI argument construction, stdin composition, response parsing, token/cost extraction from vendor-specific output formats (JSON, NDJSON, JSONL event streams), model alias resolution, system prompt wrapping strategies. `ClaudeBackend` parses three JSON formats (array with `type:"result"`, NDJSON, legacy single-object) via `extractResultJson`, validates against `ClaudeResponseSchema` requiring `modelUsage`, `usage.cache_creation_input_tokens`, `total_cost_usd`, `duration_api_ms`, constructs args with `--tools ''`, `--disable-slash-commands`, `--max-turns`, optional `--model`/`--system-prompt`. `CodexBackend` parses JSONL event stream with three-tier fallback (preferred: `item.completed` events filtered by `type==='agent_message'` excluding `type==='reasoning'`; fallback: recursive `collectText` with `shouldSkipTextObject`; legacy: raw stdout), extracts token usage from `turn.completed` events via `extractUsageFromTurnCompleted` mapping CLI keys `cached_input_tokens`/`cacheReadInputTokens`, `cache_creation_input_tokens`/`cacheCreationInputTokens` with fallbacks, composes stdin via `composePromptWithSystem` wrapping prompt in `<system-instructions>` XML. `GeminiBackend` resolves ARE model aliases (`sonnet→gemini-3-flash-preview`, `opus→gemini-3-pro-preview`, `haiku→gemini-2.5-flash`) via `resolveModelForGemini`, parses JSON `{response, stats.models[modelName].tokens.{prompt,response}}` via `GeminiResponseSchema`, constructs args with `-p` prompt flag (not stdin), `--output-format json`, folds systemPrompt into prompt using `<system-instructions>` tags (CLI lacks native system prompt flag). `OpenCodeBackend` parses NDJSON streaming output via `parseNdjson` aggregating `text` events and `step_finish` events (checks both `event.type === 'step_finish'` and `event.part.type === 'step-finish'`) into token counts (`inputTokens`, `outputTokens`, `cacheReadTokens`, `cacheWriteTokens`, `reasoningTokens`, `totalCost`, `numTurns`), calculates cost via `getModelPricing('opus')` + `computeCost` when `totalCost === 0`, ensures `.opencode/agents/are-summarizer.md` config with `{steps:5, tools:{"*":false}}` disabling agentic tools/turns, strips `'MAXIMUM STEPS REACHED'` marker if model produced >100 chars before step limit, composes stdin with `<system-instructions>` wrapper (CLI lacks `--system-prompt`/`--max-turns` flags), resolves model aliases (`sonnet→anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5`, `opus→anthropic/claude-opus-4-6`, `haiku→anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5`) via `resolveModelForOpenCode`. `isCommandOnPath(command)` checks if command exists in any `process.env.PATH` directory via `fs.stat`, on Windows appends each `process.env.PATHEXT` extension (`.EXE`, `.CMD`, `.BAT`) before stat.

**[providers/](./providers/)** — `SubprocessProvider` adapts `AIBackend` into `AIProvider` by spawning CLI subprocesses via `runSubprocess`, enforcing timeouts, detecting rate limits via stderr patterns (`['rate limit', '429', 'too many requests', 'overloaded']`), parsing stdout via `backend.parseResponse()`, emitting trace events (`subprocess:spawn`, `subprocess:exit`), and optionally logging subprocess output to disk when `logDir` configured via serialized `logWriteQueue`. Exposes `setTracer(ITraceWriter)` for late-bound trace writer, `setSubprocessLogDir(dir)` enabling per-subprocess logs, `setSubprocessCwd(cwd)` setting subprocess working directory to prevent AI CLIs discovering project context files.

**[telemetry/](./telemetry/)** — `TelemetryLogger` accumulates `TelemetryEntry[]` in memory per run, computes summary statistics (token totals, calls, duration, errors, filesRead, uniqueFilesRead), `writeRunLog()` persists `RunLog` to `.agents-reverse-engineer/logs/run-{command}-{backend}-{model}-{timestamp}.json`, `cleanupOldLogs()` prunes old logs sorted by ISO timestamp filename keeping `keepRuns` most recent.

## Architecture

Three-layer composition:
1. **AIService** (orchestration) — retry policy, telemetry recording, subprocess log management, trace emission
2. **SubprocessProvider** (transport) — subprocess spawning, timeout enforcement, rate limit detection, trace emission
3. **AIBackend** (adapter) — CLI-specific argument construction, response parsing, token extraction

`AIService` constructor auto-wraps `AIBackend` in `SubprocessProvider` for backward compatibility via `isAIBackend` type guard. `setSubprocessCwd(cwd)` prevents AI CLIs from discovering project context files (CLAUDE.md, package.json) that waste cache tokens on context ingestion.

## Retry Strategy

`AIService.call()` retries only `RATE_LIMIT` errors, never `TIMEOUT` errors — retrying timeouts risks exhausting system resources on struggling systems or unresponsive APIs. Uses `withRetry` with `maxRetries` from config, emits `{type:'retry', attempt, taskLabel, errorCode}` trace events, logs warnings on each retry attempt.

## Timeout Enforcement

`runSubprocess()` enforces `timeoutMs` with SIGTERM→SIGKILL escalation:
1. `execFile` spawns with `killSignal: 'SIGTERM'`, `maxBuffer: 100MB`
2. Timeout timer set for `timeoutMs + SIGKILL_GRACE_MS` (5000ms), unref'd to avoid blocking event loop
3. SIGKILL escalation attempts process group kill `process.kill(-child.pid, 'SIGKILL')` before falling back to single process kill
4. Timeout detection: `error.killed === true && error.code !== 'ERR_CHILD_PROCESS_STDIO_MAXBUFFER'`
5. Exit code extraction: `error.code` if number, else `child.exitCode`, else 1 for unknown failures, 0 for success

## Telemetry Flow

1. CLI command instantiates `TelemetryLogger(runId, backend, model, command)` at start with `runId = new Date().toISOString()`
2. Each `AIService.call()` adds `TelemetryEntry` with `timestamp`, `prompt`, `systemPrompt`, `response`, token counts, `latencyMs`, `exitCode`, `retryCount`, `thinking: 'not supported'`, `filesRead: []`
3. `addFilesReadToLastEntry(FileRead[])` attaches file-read metadata to most recent entry after call completion
4. `finalize()` calls `toRunLog()` to freeze state with computed summary, `writeRunLog()` persists to disk at `.agents-reverse-engineer/logs/run-{command}-{backend}-{model}-{timestamp}.json`, `cleanupOldLogs()` enforces retention policy keeping `keepRuns` most recent logs sorted by ISO timestamp filename

## Behavioral Contracts

### Rate Limit Detection (SubprocessProvider)
Stderr patterns (case-insensitive): `['rate limit', '429', 'too many requests', 'overloaded']`

### Error Classification
- Non-zero exit + stderr matches rate limit patterns → `AIServiceError('RATE_LIMIT', ...)`
- Non-zero exit + no rate limit match → `AIServiceError('SUBPROCESS_ERROR', ...)`
- Timeout → `AIServiceError('TIMEOUT', 'Subprocess timed out')`
- Parse failure → `AIServiceError('PARSE_ERROR', ...)`
- CLI not found → `AIServiceError('CLI_NOT_FOUND', ...)`

### Retry Backoff Formula
`min(baseDelayMs * multiplier^attempt, maxDelayMs) + jitter[0-500ms]`

### Subprocess Log Format (when logDir configured)
```
=== SUBPROCESS LOG ===
Task: ${taskLabel}
PID: ${childPid}
Command: ${command} ${args.join(' ')}
Exit Code: ${exitCode}
Signal: ${signal}
Duration: ${durationMs}ms
Timed Out: ${timedOut}

=== STDOUT ===
${stdout}

=== STDERR ===
${stderr}
```

### Telemetry Filename Pattern
`run-{command}-{backend}-{model}-{timestamp}.json` where `:` and `.` in segments become `-`

### Telemetry Logs Directory
`.agents-reverse-engineer/logs`

### Cleanup Sort Order
Lexicographic sort of `run-*.json` filenames (ISO 8601 timestamps sort correctly as strings)

### CLI Argument Patterns
- **Claude**: `['-p', '--output-format', 'json', '--no-session-persistence', '--tools', "''", '--disable-slash-commands', '--max-turns', ...]` — prompt NOT included (sent via stdin)
- **Codex**: `['-a', 'never', 'exec', '--json', '--skip-git-repo-check', '--ephemeral', '--color', 'never', ...]` — global flags before `exec` subcommand, terminates with `-` for stdin
- **Gemini**: `['-p', prompt, '--output-format', 'json', '-m', model]` — prompt passed via `-p` flag, NOT stdin
- **OpenCode**: `['run', '--format', 'json', '--agent', 'are-summarizer', '--model', resolvedModel]` — prompt sent via stdin

### Response Parsing Formats
- **Claude JSON Array (CLI ≥ 2.1.38)**: `[{system}, {assistant}, {result}]` — finds element with `type: "result"`, re-serializes
- **Claude NDJSON (CLI ≥ 2.1.38)**: splits by `\n`, finds line with `type: "result"`
- **Claude Legacy (CLI ≤ 2.1.31)**: finds first `{` character, slices from there
- **Codex JSONL Events**: `item.completed` with `type === 'agent_message'`, filters `item.content[]` arrays by `type === 'text' || 'output_text'`, skips `type === 'reasoning'` or `type.endsWith('.reasoning')`
- **Gemini JSON**: `{response: string|null, stats?: {models?: Record<string, {tokens?: {prompt, response, total}}>}, error?: unknown}` — extracts model name from first `stats.models` key
- **OpenCode NDJSON**: `{type: 'text', part: {type: 'text', text}}` events concatenated; `{type: 'step_finish', part: {cost?, tokens?}}` events summed (checks both `event.type === 'step_finish'` and `event.part.type === 'step-finish'`)

### Token Usage Extraction
- **Claude**: `usage.input_tokens`, `usage.cache_creation_input_tokens`, `usage.cache_read_input_tokens`, `usage.output_tokens` from `ClaudeResponseSchema`
- **Codex**: `turn.completed` events with fallback keys `input_tokens`/`inputTokens`, `cached_input_tokens`/`cache_read_input_tokens`/`cacheReadInputTokens`, `cache_creation_input_tokens`/`cacheCreationInputTokens`, `output_tokens`/`outputTokens`; non-cached input computed as `rawInput - cacheRead`
- **Gemini**: `stats.models[modelName].tokens.{prompt, response}` with defaults `0`
- **OpenCode**: `{total?, input?, output?, reasoning?, cache: {read?, write?}}` from `step_finish` events, aggregated across agentic turns; `cacheCreationTokens: cacheWriteTokens`

### Model Alias Resolution
- **Gemini**: `{sonnet: 'gemini-3-flash-preview', opus: 'gemini-3-pro-preview', haiku: 'gemini-2.5-flash', flash: 'gemini-3-flash-preview', pro: 'gemini-3-pro-preview'}` — returns input unchanged if starts with `gemini-`
- **OpenCode**: `{sonnet: 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5', opus: 'anthropic/claude-opus-4-6', haiku: 'anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5'}` — passes through names containing `/`

### System Prompt Handling
- **Claude**: native `--system-prompt` flag
- **Codex**: wrapped in `<system-instructions>\n${systemPrompt}\n</system-instructions>\n\n${prompt}` via `composePromptWithSystem`
- **Gemini**: wrapped in `<system-instructions>` XML tags prepended to prompt (no native flag)
- **OpenCode**: wrapped in `<system-instructions>` XML tags prepended to prompt (no native flag)

### Error Markers
- **OpenCode**: strips `'MAXIMUM STEPS REACHED'` from response text if model produced >100 chars of content before hitting step limit; throws `AIServiceError('PARSE_ERROR')` if marker present with ≤100 chars

### Cost Calculation
- **OpenCode** (when `totalCost === 0`): calculates via `getModelPricing('opus')` + `computeCost` from `../../dashboard/cost-calculator.js`

## Workflow & Conventions

### Subprocess CWD Override
When spawning AI CLI subprocesses, set CWD to `os.tmpdir()` via `setSubprocessCwd()` to prevent AI CLIs (especially Claude) from discovering project context files (CLAUDE.md, package.json, CLAUDE_CONTEXT.md) that waste cache tokens on automatic ingestion. This prevents redundant context overlap when prompts already include summarized documentation.
